description_long: This object is a stylized grave marker set on a rectangular stone base, resembling a headstone commonly found in cemeteries. The headstone features a tall, angular back with a stepped top and a protruding midsection, giving it a monumental appearance. The base is composed of a patterned stone slab, simulating a paved or tiled surface, which extends forward to provide a stable foundation. The structure is entirely made of a uniform, stone-like material with a matte, slightly rough finish, and is devoid of any visible inscriptions or decorative elements. The overall form is geometric and blocky, with clean lines and sharp edges, suggesting a modern or minimalist interpretation of a traditional grave marker. There are no visible crosses, statues, or additional graveyard features attached to this object.
description: A geometric, stone-like grave marker with a tall, angular headstone on a patterned rectangular base, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full face of the headstone, the stepped top, and the patterned stone base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth of the headstone and the extension of the base.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the plain, unadorned back of the headstone and the base's outline.
